waves.label: Task Contract, Event Ledger, and Hard-Constraint Promotion
waves.summary: Stand up the event-sourced execution contract, host-profile envelope, and hard-constraint promotion while carrying the thin program/wave authoring sidecar in band.

waves.label: Admissibility Policy Middleware and Re-Anchor Triggers
waves.summary: Add `admit|deny|defer` policy decisions in front of execution surfaces and trigger re-anchor after repeated drift or contradiction.

waves.label: Frontier Extraction, User-Correction Invariants, and Critical-Path Modes
waves.summary: Derive one truthful frontier and explicit execution modes so verify/recover lanes stop branching indefinitely.

waves.label: Resource Closure Analysis and Destructive-Subset Blocking
waves.summary: Compute safe, incomplete, and destructive scope for the first resource domains instead of relying on operator intuition.

waves.label: External Dependency Semantics, Receipts, and Resumability
waves.summary: Normalize semantic wait states, emit receipts, and default reruns to reattachment when work is already in flight.

waves.label: Validation Matrix Synthesis, Contradiction Detection, and History-Based Failure Blocking
waves.summary: Close the loop with validation synthesis, contradiction records, and executable preflight rules from known failure classes.
